stemHtml: Why are independent parallel approaches to closely spaced runways more vulnerable to certain weather conditions than single-runway approaches?

options.a: The conditions can cause dangerous deviations from the final approach course or track.
options.b: There is a greater chance pilots will need to execute a missed approach.
options.c: There is an increased risk of in-flight icing.
options.d: Turbulence can cause airspeed deviations disrupting traffic flow.
